title: FleetPlanResult
description: Outcome of plan_fleet / plan_fleet_with_strategy / plan_fleet_bnb / plan_fleet_insert across all agents. Stable as of v1.

results.description: Per-agent PlanWithSchedulerResult entries, in the submission order the planner ran them.

all_granted.description: Convenience flag: true iff results is non-empty and every entry has granted == true.
